name: Beef-Cabbage Rolls/Clay Cooker
recipeInstructions:
1. Soak the lid of the glazed clay cooker.
2. In a bowl, mix all ingredients well.
3. Place the mixture into the clay cooker.
4. Cover and place in a cold oven.
5. Turn the temperature to 425°F and bake for 80 minutes.
Note: This recipe is from Schlemmertopf Recipe book.
